input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.8.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.8.2.1
            TITLE: any critical fastener must meet, at minimum, one of the following:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.8.2.1: Any Critical Fastener must meet, at minimum, one of the following:
T.8.2.1 Any Critical Fastener must meet, at minimum, one of the following: 
a. SAE Grade 5 
b. Metric Class 8.8 
c. AN/MS Specifications 
d. Equivalent to or better than above, as approved by a Rules Question or at Technical 
Inspection

final_answer: Any Critical Fastener must meet, at minimum, one of the following: a. SAE Grade 5 b. Metric Class 8.8 c. AN/MS Specifications d. Equivalent to or better than above, as approved by a Rules Question or at Technical Inspection
